content:
Huh I'm feeling that same thing again. Maybe it's a Monday feeling. I went for a walk up Pidgeon Mountain (it's really beautiful up there now) but I can't get my mind off the futility of existence in the systems we have created. Even watching a skink on a rock made me feel hopeless. What is it all for, toiling away every day. I don't know what I want or who I want to be. I feel like there's inklings there but I don't know how to make it concrete. 
Watching children play on the playground made me feel little bits of happiness. 
I'm working on changing things in my mind movie. I'm trying to understand hermetic principles more. After doing shrooms I really vibe with the concept. I think this could be my path to spirituality and enlightenment.
